required_signoff: explicit repo validator signoff that transcript write-path safety, transcript-only applicability, and local-ownership boundaries are unchanged for the candidate
blocker_conditions: transcript write-path regression; role/applicability/authority drift; facade/source-mode or strict-v1 surface drift; CLI/API semantic drift; unresolved blocking lifecycle incident
rollback_path: repin requirements/m_cache_shared_external.txt to prior stable tag and force M_CACHE_SHARED_SOURCE=local when needed while preserving public CLI/API behavior
